detective.memberinvitation.DisableEmailN.Docs: Whether to send an invitation email to the member account. If set to true, the member account does not receive an invitation email.

detective.memberinvitation.GraphArn.Docs: The ARN of the behavior graph to invite the account to contribute data to.

detective.memberinvitation.MemberEmailAd.Docs: The root user email address of the invited account. If the email address provided is not the root user email address for the provided account, the invitation creation fails.

detective.memberinvitation.MemberId.Docs: The AWS account identifier of the invited account

detective.memberinvitation.Message.Docs: Customized text to include in the invitation email message.
